name: Nkisi Nkondi

distinctive_features: reflective surfaces like mirrors on the stomach or eyes
decorative tubes containing substances like gunpowder
visual_attributes.texture: rough wooden surface with metallic elements
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: upright figure with nails protruding from various parts

domain_specific_visual.SPIRITUAL_SYMBOLISM: reflective surfaces symbolize vision in the spirit world

functional_attributes.primary_function: to search out wrongdoing and enforce oaths

domain_specific_functional.SPIRITUAL_MEDIATION: mediates between the living and the spirit world

relationships.description: Nkondi are created and activated by spiritual leaders known as nganga.
Nkondi are associated with spirits known as bakisi.

contextual_attributes.historical_period: since at least the sixteenth century
contextual_attributes.geographic_range: primarily in the Territory of Cabinda
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Nkondi are used to enforce social norms and justice within the community.

contrastive_constraints: NOT devoid of nails or reflective surfaces
NOT unrelated to spiritual or judicial functions
